channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

  5. Ghost of Yotei Legends: Everything You Need to Know About the PS5 Co-op Mode  space4games

item.title: NVIDIA Says Its Future Gaming GPUs Will Bring A 1,000,000x Leap In Path Tracing Performance By Using RTX / AI Advances - Wccftech
item.description:
1. NVIDIA Says Its Future Gaming GPUs Will Bring A 1,000,000x Leap In Path Tracing Performance By Using RTX / AI Advances  Wccftech

  3. Nvidia claims 1 million times better path tracing performance is coming in future gaming GPUs — says current GPUs are already 10,000x faster than Pascal  Tom's Hardware
  4. Nvidia’s DLSS 4.5 with 6x Frame Generation is rolling out at the end of March  The Verge
  5. Path tracing perfection might be Nvidia's future but the cure for shader stutter is coming much sooner  PC Gamer
